patterns_recognized: Large f5_full_delta + negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap (pick-side pen better) = bullpen-carry conviction signal, NOT directional reversal; validated by NYY@KC 15-1 on 5/26 (delta=0.205, gap=-0.0175). NYY@OAK today mirrors the archetype (delta=0.3341, gap=-0.0143).

D-grade dual-signal-against (SP xERA AND PQI both opposing pick) holds ~60% directional failure rate post-5/25 reset; applicable to LAA@TB and ARI@SEA today where both primary signals oppose the model pick direction.

HARD CAP 10 CONFIRM-rescued picks in (0.50, 0.55] hit only 47.6% historically; declining rescue is appropriate when the road team has a materially worse record and no supporting BvP context (BOS 23-32 road vs CLE 33-25 home).

SOFT CAP 6.5 calibration-caution (edge 18-25pp): CONFIRM acceptable per protocol, but MIL@HOU model edge of 19.58pp (model=65.3% vs market=45.8%) likely reflects miscalibration — MIL is 33-20 vs struggling HOU 26-32.

ATL @ CIN.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires on -8.3pp negative edge: market prices ATL at 58.41% while model gives 50.11%, meaning the market correctly identifies ATL (38-19, dominant record) as a substantial road favorite that the model underestimates. F3_swing_take_gap=27.4 is the weakest F3 signal on today's slate — minimal conviction. PQI confirms ATL (Δ=-9.1) and pre-cap score=3 (B+), but the 8.3pp market gap invalidates any directional confidence at inferior model odds. Cap enforcement is EV-correct; no qualitative reason to override.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 EV-protective on negative-edge GOLD (5/26 pattern)
market superior information when model substantially underestimates dominant team

SD @ WSH.reasoning: WSH (29-28) at 59.48% model probability vs 48.23% market-implied suggests model overestimates the home side. PQI fires against WSH (Δ=-4.6, late-game degradation). Lucas Giolito (SD, experienced veteran) faces Paxton Schultz (WSH home). HARD CAP 10 correctly fires (pick_prob=0.538 bottom-bucket without CONFIRM). Pre-cap score=0 (C) already reflects PQI headwind. SKIP disposition is correct; directional case for WSH is insufficient to support a CONFIRM given the PQI flag and market gap.
lessons_applied: PQI against pick as directional headwind
HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket without market-model alignment

MIN @ PIT.reasoning: Jared Jones (PIT home) holds 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date; PENDING_SP_DATA is a non-negotiable hard stop per HARD CAP 5 design. Taj Bradley (MIN away) has Statcast data but grading requires both starters. No directional call is appropriate — any pick without PIT SP quality data would be directionally arbitrary. Protocol validated on 5/26 CHC@PIT (12-1 PIT blowout after PENDING correctly prevented pick on Jordan Wicks' 0-pitch start).
lessons_applied: thin_sp_data hard stop — zero-data SP threshold mandatory
PENDING_SP_DATA validation 5/26 CHC@PIT

BOS @ CLE.reasoning: Declining HARD CAP 10 rescue. BOS at 23-32 (road, struggling) visiting CLE at 33-25 (home, solid). Model picks BOS at 51.63% with F3 as sole primary signal, but PQI fires against BOS (Δ=+6.2, late-game degradation) and team quality is -1. Market gives BOS only 46.82%, reflecting CLE's genuine home quality edge. No BvP data available to support directional conviction. Archive shows CONFIRM-rescued bottom-bucket picks hit only 47.6%; this case (road team 10 games below .500 vs home team 8 above) is weaker than an average rescue.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 10 CONFIRM-rescue only 47.6% hit rate
road team record disadvantage (23-32 vs 33-25) as DOWNGRADE signal
PQI against pick on weak directional case

LAA @ TB.reasoning: D-grade (-2): Walbert Ureña (LAA, 21.81% K-rate) holds 0.95 xERA edge over Nick Martinez (TB home, 13.48% K-rate), and PQI fires against TB (Δ=-8.4). D-grade dual-signal-against has ~60% directional failure rate. However, TB (34-19, best record on today's slate) vs LAA (22-35, weakest) represents the largest team-quality gap in this slate. Negative edge (-0.80pp) and acute_roster flag on LAA add caution. SKIP and edge-floor correctly prevent stake; CONFIRM the D-grade directional read given TB's dominant team quality.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against ~60% failure rate (post-5/25 reset)
TB team quality (34-19) offsets SP disadvantage in full-game model

MIA @ NYM.reasoning: MIA (26-31, away) at NYM (23-33, home); MIA has the marginally better record. F3_swing_take_gap=3226.0 fires, Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.01). Max Meyer (MIA) faces Freddy Peralta (NYM home). No BvP or platoon data available. PQI mildly against MIA (Δ=+3.8). Edge=8.17pp within [4,15]pp band, but HARD CAP 10 fires without CONFIRM (pick_prob=0.511 bottom-bucket). With CONFIRM, score=1 (B-, no stake). No qualitative reason to deviate from the model's neutral directional read given comparable team records.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket — score=1 (B-) even if CONFIRM, no stake
F3 fires on similarly matched teams — low directional conviction

CHC @ STL.reasoning: Massive f5_full_delta=0.2718: STL wins full game at 64.01% but F5 at only 36.84%, implying an extreme bullpen-carry thesis against Shota Imanaga (CHC, 25.35% K-rate). SP edge 0.34 xERA against STL and Stage 1/2 disagree produce D-grade correctly. Edge=20.78pp in calibration-caution zone (SOFT CAP 6.5) and outside [4,15]pp staking range. CHC (31-26) vs STL (29-25) are comparable teams. SKIP correctly applied; the STL full-game bullpen thesis is speculative against Imanaga's SP quality.
lessons_applied: D-grade Stage 1/2 disagree + SP against pick
SOFT CAP 6.5 calibration-caution on edge 18-25pp (CONFIRM acceptable, no stake)

DET @ CHW.reasoning: Troy Melton (DET away) holds 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date. Erick Fedde (CHW home) has data, but grading requires both starters. PENDING_SP_DATA protocol is mandatory — directional call without DET SP quality would be arbitrary. Consistent with protocol validation across every PENDING game in the archive.
lessons_applied: thin_sp_data hard stop — both starters must have 100+ Statcast pitches

KC @ TEX.reasoning: TEX (25-31) hosts KC (22-34); both struggling teams. Multiple opposing signals: SP edge 0.68 xERA against TEX (Kolek > Gore, small-sample min_pa=98), PQI against TEX (Δ=-8.0), confidence_downgrade=True. Edge=3.35pp below the 4pp staking floor — outside staking range regardless of grade. Pre-cap score=0 (C) already reflects the headwinds. No qualitative reason to adjust below the already-weak C grade; CONFIRM the zero-stake SKIP with modest directional lean toward TEX as the less poor team.
lessons_applied: small-sample SP (min_pa=98) cap on SP edge confidence
edge below 4pp floor prevents staking independent of grade

MIL @ HOU.reasoning: B+ grade (score=3): F3_swing_take_gap=3650.3, PQI confirms HOU (+3.8), Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.03). No hard caps fire. Edge=19.58pp in SOFT CAP 6.5 calibration-caution zone and outside [4,15]pp staking range — correctly zeroes stake. Market gives HOU only 45.75% vs model's 65.34% (MIL is 33-20, HOU is 26-32); likely miscalibration at this edge level. Per SOFT CAP 6.5 protocol CONFIRM is acceptable. The B+ grade reflects genuine HOU lineup/swing-take quality vs Coleman Crow (MIL, new arm), but financial exposure is correctly prevented.
lessons_applied: SOFT CAP 6.5 calibration-caution (18-25pp): CONFIRM acceptable, stake halved/zeroed
B+ grade genuine despite market disagreement — edge range enforces zero stake

SF @ COL.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires on -11.56pp negative edge at Coors Field: market gives SF 62.73% while model gives 51.17%. Logan Webb (SF ace) vs Michael Lorenzen (COL home). F1_xera_gap=1.51* (thin-sample asterisk but F3=820.1 satisfies HARD CAP 5 secondary-signal requirement). SP edge 1.33 xERA agrees with SF (+2), PQI confirms (Δ=-13.3), pre-cap score=3 (B+). Market's superior Coors-adjusted probability for SF should be respected. Cap is EV-correct; no override warranted despite strong directional signals.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 EV-protection: market superior at Coors (COL 20-37)
F1* thin-sample satisfied by F3 secondary signal (HARD CAP 5 met)

NYY @ OAK.reasoning: PLATINUM B- (score=1): f5_full_delta=0.3341 (OAK wins F5 at 58.43% via Severino; NYY wins full game at 74.98% via bullpen-carry). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0143 (NYY HL pen better) matches the 5/26 NYY@KC pattern (delta=0.205, gap=-0.0175: NYY won 15-1) — large f5_full_delta with pick-side pen superior is bullpen-carry conviction, not a reversal signal. pick_prob=0.7498 is outside calibrator's valid range [0.48, 0.72], correctly generating B- rather than B+. NYY (34-22) vs OAK (27-29). F2_xwoba_gap=0.025 confirms NYY lineup quality. No stake at score=1.
lessons_applied: f5_full_delta large + negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap = bullpen-carry conviction (5/26 NYY@KC validation)
pick_prob outside calibrator range [0.48,0.72] correctly limits PLATINUM to B-

ARI @ SEA.reasoning: D-grade (-3): George Kirby (SEA home, elite ace) holds 1.52 xERA edge over Zac Gallen (ARI away, 15.33% K-rate vs Kirby's 19.67%), and PQI fires strongly against ARI (Δ=+29.9 — among the highest on this slate). fair_prob=0.3965 triggers the <0.42 floor, independently generating SKIP. Both primary signals oppose ARI at high magnitude, consistent with D-grade dual-signal-against at ~60% directional failure rate. SEA (28-29) holds home field advantage with Kirby as one of the better SPs in MLB. CONFIRM the SKIP; ARI directional lean is weakly negative.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against ~60% failure rate
fair_prob < 0.42 floor as independent SKIP trigger
large PQI headwind (Δ=+29.9) as strongest opposing signal

PHI @ LAD.reasoning: PLATINUM WITHHELD (SP against pick): Zack Wheeler (PHI, elite ace, 24.62% K-rate) vs Justin Wrobleski (LAD home, 15.0% K-rate). SP edge 0.92 xERA against LAD, PQI against (Δ=-15.9), Stage 1/2 disagree (f5_full_delta=0.3041). F3_swing_take_gap=8649.6 is the largest on today's slate and hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0087 (LAD pen better) support the full-game LAD thesis. Score=0 (C) correctly reflects the SP-vs-lineup tension — model right to withhold PLATINUM. No financial exposure; LAD's lineup quality conviction is real but insufficient to override Wheeler's SP edge early.
lessons_applied: PLATINUM tier WITHHELD when SP opposes pick (correct application)
large F3 + bullpen gap support LAD full-game thesis but cannot overcome Wheeler's early dominance

TOR @ BAL.reasoning: TOR away SP not yet announced. BAL has Trevor Rogers as home starter (100+ Statcast pitches). Without TOR's away SP quality data, grading is impossible — PENDING_SP_DATA protocol is mandatory. No directional call is appropriate regardless of BAL's home advantage.
lessons_applied: thin_sp_data hard stop — away SP not announced prevents grading
